backend/main.mo: Motoko actor implementing the fitness app backend with profile management, workout/meal plan generation, and role-based access control via MixinAuthorization. Exposes query and update functions for profiles, workout plans, and meal plans with admin/user permission checks.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping two implemented features — replacing the Internet Identity login with a simple onboarding screen, and persisting profile data in localStorage — to their relevant source files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing short summaries of each frontend source file, describing their purpose, key hooks used, and notable implementation details for the Powerpal fitness app.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS entry file defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark themes, including background, foreground, primary, accent, border, and sidebar color tokens.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the Powerpal React app, mounting the app into a root div and loading the main TypeScript entry point as an ES module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that reads the profile from localStorage via useGetProfile, shows OnboardingFlow when no profile exists, and renders the appropriate view (workout, meal, schedule, goals, adaptive) based on navigation state — no authentication required.
frontend/src/components/AdaptiveLevelsVi: Fitness level selector view that lets users choose between beginner, intermediate, and advanced levels, saves the updated profile to localStorage, and regenerates the workout plan using local query hooks.
frontend/src/components/GoalDrivenPlansV: A view component that lets users select a fitness goal and regenerate their workout and meal plans accordingly, with navigation buttons to other app sections.
frontend/src/components/LoginScreen.tsx: An empty file with no content.
frontend/src/components/MealPlanView.tsx: Displays a personalized weekly meal plan with day-by-day navigation and a button to regenerate the plan, plus links to other app views.
frontend/src/components/OnboardingFlow.t: A single-step onboarding form that collects a user's name and age, creates a default profile, and generates initial workout and meal plans before completing setup.
frontend/src/components/PowerpalMascot.t: Renders an animated mascot image with a rotating speech bubble whose messages vary by context (home, onboarding, plan, meal), with a fallback placeholder if the image fails to load.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: A multi-step (3-step) onboarding modal that collects name, age, fitness level, and goal, then saves the profile and generates workout and meal plans via backend mutations.
frontend/src/components/WeeklyScheduleVi: React component that displays a 7-day workout schedule with expandable day cards, completion tracking, and navigation buttons to other views (Workout, Meal Plan, Goals, Levels).
React component that renders the user's workout plan with a banner, mascot, and a generate/regenerate button, plus navigation to other app sections.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing ICP Internet Identity authentication state, including login, logout, and identity persistence via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useLocalQueries.ts: React Query hooks for reading and writing profile, workout plan, and meal plan data entirely from localStorage, with local plan generation utilities.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: React Query hooks that interact with the ICP backend actor to fetch and mutate profile, workout plan, and meal plan data on-chain.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Barlow fonts, sets up Tailwind layers, defines OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for the dark theme, and adds custom utility classes for glows, gradients, animations, and athletic card styles.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that mounts the app with QueryClientProvider for data fetching and InternetIdentityProvider for ICP authentication wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Landing page component that displays the Powerpal hero section with mascot, tagline, and CTA buttons that differ based on whether the user has an existing profile.
frontend/src/utils/localStorage.ts: Utility module for persisting and retrieving Profile, WeeklyPlan, and WeeklyMealPlan data in localStorage, with custom BigInt serialization/deserialization support.
frontend/src/utils/planGenerator.ts: Client-side generator that produces WeeklyPlan workout schedules and WeeklyMealPlan meal plans with goal-specific exercises and meals based on a user's FitnessGoal profile.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading URL query parameters from both standard and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence helpers and a function to remove sensitive params from the URL hash.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the theme with Barlow fonts, OKLCH-based color tokens mapped to CSS variables, custom glow box shadows, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Tracks the Powerpal project state at version 3, recording two implemented features: a simple name/age onboarding screen replacing Internet Identity login, and localStorage persistence of profile data.
